reason: Defines the current visual Design System, final DESIGN.md, page-prompt, suite completeness, and downstream slicing contracts that candidate selection must preserve.
Defines persisted artifact recovery and the rule that components consume one typed normalization boundary rather than interpreting persisted fields independently.
Defines truthful capability reporting, preview/apply, paid approval, revision binding, receipts, cancellation, and external Agent surface limits.
Defines how user and Agent instructions enter paid visual calls without hidden prompt changes or fabricated approval.
Defines Asset Production source revision and design-system binding contracts that selection changes must invalidate explicitly.
Required for the Design IR, persistence, runtime, UI, compiler, and external-contract data flow in this cross-layer change.
Guides reuse of visual-generation review gates, creative-board decisions, and generic candidate contracts instead of Design System-only duplication.
Owns the candidate-plan precedence, generic persisted contract, promotion/token authority, UX, compatibility, failure matrix, and rollback design.
